message:
feat(deps,search): upgrade rand 0.10 + reqwest 0.13, add frankensearch-lexical, and introduce query-class-aware hybrid budgeting

Dependency upgrades:
- rand 0.8 -> 0.10: migrate all callsites from thread_rng/gen/gen_range
  to rng/random/random_range; update OsRng imports to use aead::rand_core
  and argon2::password_hash::rand_core where needed
- rand_chacha 0.3 -> 0.10 (dev dependency)
- reqwest: rename feature rustls-tls -> rustls for 0.13 compatibility
- Add frankensearch-lexical path dependency for snippet generation and
  offset-aware query execution

Search improvements:
- Replace per-hit SnippetGenerator with frankensearch-lexical's
  fs_try_build_snippet_generator + fs_render_snippet_html for more
  robust snippet rendering (graceful fallback on failure)
- Replace TopDocs::with_limit().and_offset() with
  fs_execute_query_with_offset for consistent offset handling
- Introduce HybridCandidateBudget and hybrid_candidate_budget() that
  uses FsQueryClass to classify queries (Identifier, ShortKeyword,
  NaturalLanguage) and allocate asymmetric lexical/semantic fanout:
  identifiers bias lexical 6:2, natural language biases semantic 2:8
- For unlimited queries (limit=0), cap semantic fanout at 2048 while
  preserving full lexical coverage, preventing full-corpus ANN scoring
- Preserve limit=0 "no limit" semantics through TantivySearchService
  into hybrid_search instead of eagerly expanding to total_docs

CLI changes:
- Change search --limit default from 10 to 0 (no limit), matching the
  unlimited-by-default convention established in the previous RRF commit

Tests:
- Add hybrid_budget_identifier_biases_lexical test
- Add hybrid_budget_no_limit_caps_semantic_without_capping_lexical test
- Update introspect_search_limit_default test for new default of 0
- Rewrite UPGRADE_LOG.md to reflect current upgrade status

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
